evals.name: courses-render
evals.prompt: /erd-diagram — render the DBML model in this project (input/model.dbml, an online course platform) into a professional HTML ER diagram.
evals.expected_output: A single self-contained model.html with an embedded SVG ER diagram (Graphviz), cleanly routed connectors, a professional title, interactive pan/zoom, and all four tables (instructors, courses, students, enrollments).

assertions.text: An .html diagram file is produced as the deliverable
The page embeds an <svg> ER diagram from a real layout engine (not hand-rolled div/CSS boxes)
Self-contained: no external http(s) <script>/<link> (no CDN dependency)
Every table from the DBML appears in the diagram (instructors, courses, students, enrollments)
A single professional title heads the page (one <h1>)
FK relationship connectors are drawn between tables
Connectors are engine-routed paths (the renderer's native dbdiagram.io-style routing), not hand-drawn div/CSS lines
Interactive pan/zoom controls are present

evals.name: saas-render
evals.prompt: /erd-diagram — render the DBML model in this project (input/model.dbml, a B2B SaaS subscription billing system) into a professional HTML ER diagram.
evals.expected_output: A single self-contained model.html with an embedded SVG ER diagram, cleanly routed connectors, a professional title, interactive pan/zoom, and all five tables (organizations, plans, users, subscriptions, invoices) plus the two enums.

assertions.text: An .html diagram file is produced as the deliverable
The page embeds an <svg> ER diagram from a real layout engine (not hand-rolled div/CSS boxes)
Self-contained: no external http(s) <script>/<link> (no CDN dependency)
Every table from the DBML appears in the diagram (organizations, plans, users, subscriptions, invoices)
A single professional title heads the page (one <h1>)
FK relationship connectors are drawn between tables
Connectors are engine-routed paths (the renderer's native dbdiagram.io-style routing), not hand-drawn div/CSS lines
Interactive pan/zoom controls are present

evals.name: projects-render
evals.prompt: /erd-diagram — render the DBML model in this project (input/model.dbml, a project management tool with nested tasks) into a professional HTML ER diagram.
evals.expected_output: A single self-contained model.html with an embedded SVG ER diagram, cleanly routed connectors (including the self-referential task→parent edge), a professional title, interactive pan/zoom, and all four tables (teams, users, projects, tasks).

assertions.text: An .html diagram file is produced as the deliverable
The page embeds an <svg> ER diagram from a real layout engine (not hand-rolled div/CSS boxes)
Self-contained: no external http(s) <script>/<link> (no CDN dependency)
Every table from the DBML appears in the diagram (teams, users, projects, tasks)
A single professional title heads the page (one <h1>)
FK relationship connectors are drawn between tables (including the self-referential task parent)
Connectors are engine-routed paths (the renderer's native dbdiagram.io-style routing), not hand-drawn div/CSS lines
Interactive pan/zoom controls are present
